title: Una chica de opereta
writer: Concha Linares Becerra, Aureliano Campa, Ramón Quadreny
actors: Josita Hernán, Luis Prendes, José Isbert
plot: A poor composer sells his songs to a music publisher who attributes them to his son, who sells them to a famous singer. Seeking the son, the musician's daughter will unexpectedly find a job as secretary to the singer, disguised as...
